architecture.summary: The system evaluates whether large language models can identify errors in long chain-of-thought reasoning trajectories. Models are prompted to detect and locate errors within multi-step reasoning chains, with evaluation focused on their ability to recognize logical inconsistencies, computational mistakes, and reasoning flaws at various depths and chain lengths.

biblio.title: Can Large Language Models Detect Errors in Long Chain-of-Thought Reasoning?

claims.statement: Large language models can detect errors in long chain-of-thought reasoning
